Services

Network · Projects · Workforce Development

Network

Let us help you find the resources you need within the BioHub community.

Projects

Sponsored and collaborative R&D across process development, scale-up, and strain engineering.

Workforce Development

Take our courses or partner with us to create new ones.

Network

Let us help you find the resources you need within the BioHub community.

Projects

Process Development

Bioprocess development and optimization from bench to pilot readiness.

Scale-Up

Scale-down models, tech transfer readiness, and reproducible data packages for decision-making.

Strain Engineering

Design-build-test-learn workflows for rapid strain construction and screening.

Project Resources

BioFoundry

Automation-enabled DBTL workflows to accelerate strain construction, testing, and learning.

Scale-Up Lab

Bioprocess development and fermentation infrastructure for scale-down through pilot readiness.

Builder's Lab

Hands-on prototyping for hardware, sensors, tooling, and practical biomanufacturing skills.

Workforce Development

Take our courses or partner with us to create new ones.
